name: Palace White Chocolate Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Imported white chocolate (cut into very small cubes)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------STRAWBERRY SAUCE---------------------
2 pints Strawberries (washed and hulled)
2 tbsp Imported kirsch
1 tbsp Sugar
1 pinch Salt
1. Combine sugar cubes and water in a saucepan. Bring to boil, stirring or shaking the pan occasionally until the sugar melts.
2. Continue cooking without stirring until the syrup reaches the hard ball stage (225°F on a candy thermometer).
3. Whip egg whites to form soft peaks.
4. Reduce speed of the mixer and slowly add the syrup while continuing to beat.
5. Beat in chocolate pieces; they will melt partially.
6. Cool mixture to lukewarm.
7. Whip cream until stiff and fold into the mousse.
8. Chill for at least 4 hours.
To serve:
1. Place Strawberry Sauce on a chilled dessert plate (or in an individual cup).
2. Top with mousse.
3. Garnish with 1 or 2 mint leaves. Pass remaining sauce separately.
Strawberry Sauce: Puree strawberries. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Cover and chill thoroughly.
